proyectos.descripcion_listado: Digital control tower for international shipment management. Automates tracking and quotes instantly.
proyectos.desafio: Moving global freight used to be a nightmare of emails and broken spreadsheets. Agencies lost hours tracking manually.
proyectos.solucion: Designed LogIA as the central brain. Centralizes real-time tracking and turns hours of quoting math into a single click.
logros: 90% reduction in quoting and document creation time
Structured interface to reduce visual fatigue
Automated tracking with main carriers (Maersk, MSC)

proyectos.descripcion_listado: Autonomous conversational agent trained for B2B lead qualification that triples conversion rates.
proyectos.desafio: Sales team spent 70% of their time on unqualified prospects arriving in mass volumes.
proyectos.solucion: Deployed an AI Agent using n8n for orchestration and OpenAI with RAG. Filters and notifies CRM asynchronously.

proyectos.descripcion_listado: High-end e-commerce ecosystem. Software engineering applied to gym machinery sales with hyper SEO.
proyectos.titulo_modal:
E&G Fitness
Elite Training Platform
proyectos.desafio: Create a digital interface that replicates the experience of a luxury fitness equipment showroom.
proyectos.solucion: Hybrid platform combining Django backend with ultra-optimized Vanilla JS for instant filtering and navigation.
logros: Leading SEO positioning in its niche
Intuitive interface inspired by automotive luxury

proyectos.descripcion_listado: Digital ecosystem for international freight management, customs, and 360 logistics.
proyectos.desafio: Transform the complexity of foreign trade into a fluid digital experience, allowing clients to manage freights, customs, and insurance from a single SPA platform.
proyectos.solucion: Development of a high-performance Single Page Application (SPA) with a focus on speed and visual clarity, integrating tracking modules, dynamic quotations, and express cargo services.
